institutionName: North Carolina Agricultural and Technical State University
collegeName: College of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences (CAES)
programName: Bachelor of Science in Family & Consumer Sciences — Fashion Merchandising & Design
tagline: Design the Future of Fashion — From Concept to Consumer
programDescription: The Fashion Merchandising & Design concentration blends creative design with business strategy, preparing students for careers in fashion retail, product development, visual merchandising, and brand management. Students learn textile science, trend forecasting, fashion illustration, and retail management through studio courses and industry internships with leading fashion brands and retailers.

careerOutlook.outlook: The Piedmont Triad region is a historic hub for textile and apparel companies, giving NC A&T students proximity to major employers like VF Corporation and Kontoor Brands. Fashion careers increasingly demand sustainability expertise and digital design skills.
